annual_marginal_vector.development_target: Daymet v4 R1, 1980-2009 exposed fit period
annual_marginal_vector.noninferiority: each normalized component <= its uniform-library component + 1e-7
annual_marginal_vector.strict_improvement: aggregate normalized L1 distance <= 0.95 times uniform-library distance

authority_map.fitted_monthly_surface: accepted A5a station .par bytes represented by the A5b base_station parameters
authority_map.path_dependence_improvement: exposed Daymet fit-period detrended annual dependence targets
authority_map.unparameterized_preservation: uniform faithful_5_32_3 plus qc_filter off development library

calendar.policy: Gregorian source and destination years must have identical 365/366-day class
calendar.relabeling: day and month remain unchanged; only destination year is relabeled

monthly: wet amount first and second raw sums
Tmax/Tmin first and second raw sums
daily precipitation-Tmax, precipitation-Tmin, and Tmax-Tmin raw cross sums
wet-day duration, time-to-peak, and peak-ratio first and second raw sums

library_realizations.role: one canonical nested library, not an independent replicate

marginal_solver.certificate: primal weights plus independently recomputed constraints and objective
marginal_solver.deterministic_tie_break: second solve within 1e-9 of optimum minimizing index-weighted weights
marginal_solver.objective: normalized L1 distance to six Daymet annual raw-moment targets

path.noninferiority: each dependence component <= uniform chronological component + 0.10 normalized units
path.strict_improvement: aggregate normalized dependence distance <= 0.95 times chronological baseline distance
path.thirty_year_rule: strict first 30 years of the constructed 100-year path

selection_rule: Choose the first pool in ascending order, then the first algorithm in declared order, only if all 17 stations and all three path seeds pass both marginal and path contracts; otherwise issue the most specific hold.
